raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Leon Raymond Hubbard Jr. Marine Fish Hatchery in Carlsbad is the only salt-water fish hatchery on the West Coast.",
    "The Ocean Resources Enhancement and Hatchery Program (OREHP) is the longest-running program of its kind in the country.",
    "The OREHP has significantly contributed to the world’s understanding of how to successfully spawn, rear, and release saltwater fish.",
    "A California Sea Grant evaluation conducted by the Scripps Institution of Oceanography in 2015 provided core recommendations for reforming the OREHP.",
    "AB 1949 expands the scope of the OREHP to include research on all species that have an economic impact on California.",
    "Research since the establishment of OREHP has identified 13 additional species that can benefit from the program’s cultivation efforts.",
    "Optimizing the OREHP for contemporary needs improves its usefulness in securing California’s sustainable fishing future."
  ]
}
```
